qr.about.label: About
qr.about.title: Free online QR code generator — full customisation, all content types, instant download
qr.about.body1: QR codes have become the universal bridge between physical and digital — on restaurant menus, product packaging, business cards, event posters, and museum exhibits worldwide. This free online QR code generator lets you create professional, fully customised QR codes for 8 different content types in seconds, with no account, no watermark, and no daily limit.
qr.about.body2: Choose from eight content types: URL (link to any website), vCard (digital business card that recipients can save directly to their phone contacts), plain text (display a message up to 300 characters), SMS (pre-fill a text message to a specific number), Email (pre-fill recipient, subject line, and body), WiFi (auto-connect guests to your network — no password typing required), Twitter/X (pre-compose a tweet), and Bitcoin (generate a cryptocurrency payment QR code with address and optional amount).
qr.about.body3: Every visual aspect of your QR code is customisable. Choose from five dot shapes — Square, Rounded, Dots, Classy, and Classy Rounded — to match your brand aesthetic. Select corner frame and eye styles to create a distinctive look. Set any foreground and background colour, or apply a multi-stop gradient for a modern finish. Upload your company logo or brand icon to embed it in the centre of the QR code. A real-time preview updates instantly as you adjust settings, so you always see exactly what you'll download before committing.
qr.about.body4: Download your finished QR code in four formats: PNG at resolutions up to 2000×2000 pixels for sharp digital use, SVG for infinitely scalable vector output ideal for large-format printing, JPG for maximum compatibility, or EPS for professional print workflows in Adobe Illustrator and InDesign. All generation happens locally in your browser — no data is sent to any server, keeping your WiFi passwords, business URLs, and contact details completely private.
qr.about.body5: QR codes generated by this tool follow the ISO/IEC 18004 standard and are compatible with all modern smartphone camera apps on iOS and Android — no third-party QR scanner app required. They work reliably at error correction level H (30% damage tolerance), meaning they still scan correctly even if partially obscured by a logo, decorative element, or minor print imperfection. Whether you are a marketer, restaurant owner, event organiser, developer, or small business — this tool delivers professional results without professional costs.
